raw_consumer_statement:
My Citi credit card was charged an on amount of {$180.00} on XX/XX/year>. I disputed. 
Citi bank sent me dispute response which shows that someone name : XXXX XXXX XXXX used my card to order XXXX XXXX phone, with proof of delivery to XXXX XXXX, US. I do not know who are they. I did not do this transaction. 

I just support evidence to Citi bank and they are re-opening dispute. 

I also lock my credit card. I hope Citi bank can do further investigation for my case. I am feeling unsecure if I continue using this credit card.
